name: Ginger Icing (Cream Cheese Frosting with Candied Ginger)
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons unsalted butter, at room temperature
8 ounces cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter and cream cheese together in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add the vanilla extract and lemon juice to the mixture; beat again until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sifted powdered sugar, beating until the frosting reaches a spreadable consistency.
4. Stir in the candied ginger.
5. Spread the icing on top of a warm spice cake such as carrot, banana, or pineapple cake.
This frosting is best when applied to the cake while it is still warm and serves 9 or 12 servings.
